LanguageData.XF_CutBulletChance.label: Bullet Deflection Chance - Armed
LanguageData.XF_CutBulletChance.description:
The chance to deflect projectiles in non-melee situations or when stunned. The character must wear power armor and be equipped with an XF High Frequency Weapon or Bladelink Weapon for this to take effect. The character begins to master this technique when their Melee skill reaches level 14.
*Bullet Deflection will cause 1-4 points of damage to the melee weapon's durability, while Bladelink Weapon will only suffer wear when deflecting attacks with damage greater than 8, with a 35% chance of consuming 1 point of durability.(Weapon durability loss can be disabled in the MOD settings interface.)
LanguageData.XF_ParryChance.label: Parry Chance - Armed
LanguageData.XF_ParryChance.description:
The chance to parry an opponent's attack in melee combat. The character must wear power armor and be equipped with a melee weapon for this to take effect. The character begins to master this technique when their Melee skill reaches level 10.
*Parry will make 1-3 points of damage to the durability of melee weapons, except for Bladelink weapons.(Weapon durability loss can be disabled in the MOD settings interface.)
LanguageData.XF_StunChance.label: Stun Chance - Armed
LanguageData.XF_StunChance.description: The chance to stun the opponent after a successful parry in melee combat. The character must wear power armor and be equipped with a melee weapon for this to take effect. The character begins to master this technique when their Melee skill reaches level 10.
